<!--
Build Nervous System — three-layer authoring record. See docs/build-nervous-system.md.
Keep each of intent/gen/integrate to one line. Then fill in Summary and Test plan.
-->

## intent
<!-- What was asked / the ticket summary, in one line. -->

## gen
<!-- What the agent generated, one factual line, no marketing language. -->

## integrate
<!-- What a human/agent adjusted before merge, one line, or "none" if no manual adjustment was needed. -->

## Summary
<!-- What changed and why, in a few lines. -->

## Test plan
<!-- How you verified this: commands run, checks expected green, manual steps. -->
